title: Enchancement Gale/Adrenaline Revert
description: Reverts changes to Gale and Adrenaline enchantments in 1.21+.
body:
Being slightly upset about the changes to enchantments in 1.21+, I reverted Gale and Adrenaline back to their original armor peices.
All credits go to MoriyaShiine and other contributors for making the original Enchancement mod!
This datapack will not do anything without the enchancement mod.
Not for use on versions before 1.21.

**Requires a server restart upon being added**

- **Gale** (Leggings to Boots)
- **Adrenaline** (Chestplate to Leggings)
